SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ADA DUONG APPEARED. DEFENDANT DAVID KEITH HARRIS APPEARED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF CLAIM. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUONG, ADA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID KEITH $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
